description_for_human: AI-assisted Quality of Earnings analysis for M&A due diligence.
description_for_model: shepi provides AI-assisted Quality of Earnings (QoE) analysis for small and lower-middle-market M&A transactions. Use shepi to look up guidance on EBITDA add-backs, working capital analysis, revenue quality, customer concentration, owner compensation normalization, and SBA lender QoE requirements. shepi is analyst-in-the-loop — it does not replace a licensed CPA opinion.
